notes: Chip-level 2024 data. Source: canonical sheet https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1unfVrnl3bzKIrf6ASRpNtlfV1vIGoS7W66ZoeR-kKlc/edit — users_2024 tab (shares) + owner_fleet_by_chip_type (fleet anchors from Epoch AI Chip Owners DB). CI on h100e is the naive product of share × fleet endpoints (not a full Monte Carlo). Last synced: 2026-04-24T15:03:22Z.

[Inflection absorption Mar 2024](https://blogs.microsoft.com/blog/2024/03/19/mustafa-suleyman-deepmind-and-inflec

[CoreWeave-OpenAI agreement (Mar 10 2025)](https://www.cnbc.com/2025/03/10/openai-to-pay-coreweave-11point9-billion-over-five-years-for-ai-tech.html) establishes first direct contract was March 2025.
CoreWeave S-1 discloses top-3 customers = 77% of 2024 revenue (Microsoft + 2 undisclosed).

Apple AFM paper (arxiv 2407.21075, July 29 2024): 'AFM-server was trained on 8192 TPUv4 chips provisioned as 8x1024 chip slices.' Training-time disclosure, not EOY occupancy.
Gemini 1.5 Pro trained on TPU v4 (arxiv 2403.05530 full text); PaLM 2 + internal workloads continue on v4.
Midjourney v4 training continued 2024 (v6e migration date not publicly confirmed); Character.AI v4 training continued; residual Vertex AI enterprise.

Residual. v5e inference-first positioning; Google production serving (Search, YouTube, Ads, Gemini inference).
Enterprise Vertex AI inference; 2.7x price-performance advantage over v4 per v5e launch blog drove enterprise migration.

Apple AFM paper (arxiv 2407.21075): 'AFM-on-device was trained on one slice of 2048 TPUv5p chips.' Training-time disclosure, not EOY occupancy.
Residual — no 2024 Google training run explicitly names v5p; structural inference from v5p being premium training chip through 2024.
Salesforce named as early v5p customer (Dec 2023 launch blog); continuation into 2024.
No 2024 Anthropic-v6e disclosure. Anthropic's named TPU references are v5e (Nov 2023) and Ironwood/v7 (Oct 2025).
Apple's disclosed 2024 TPU footprint is v4+v5p per the July 2024 AFM paper. No v6e migration publicly reported.
